response.justification: Senior engineer with 15+ years of experience and a recent, directly relevant role at re:cinq working with TypeScript, Node.js, and AI agent infrastructure (including MCP), which maps closely to the primary stack and the AI-agent requirement. Solid React + MongoDB + AWS exposure at Optilyz, strong testing/TDD background, and proficiency across multiple languages (TS, Java, Kotlin-adjacent JVM via Java, Python touchpoints implied) meet most listed requirements. Gaps around explicit Nest.js and Vitest, plus heavy DLang usage in earlier roles, are minor and easily probed in an interview.
strengths: Recent hands-on TypeScript/Node.js plus AI agent and MCP work directly aligned to the role
15+ years across full stack with React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes, and strong TDD/CI-CD craft
Polyglot background (TS, Java, C/C++, DLang, Swift) supports the multi-language requirement
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in the resume
Career gap from October 2025 to present with no stated reason
Significant portions of past work in DLang and Ember.js rather than the target React/Nest stack

key_factors.factor: Recent TypeScript/Node + AI agent/MCP experience at re:cinq
Senior full-stack depth with React, cloud, and testing discipline
Missing explicit Nest.js/Vitest and current career gap
